Vinayapiṭaka/X/X/162.text: (Ayamettha saṅkhepo. Vitthāro panassa anupubbikathaṁ icchantehi Paramatthajotikāya Khuddakaṭṭhakathāya 135 piṭṭhe Ratanasuttavaṇṇanāto gahetabbo) (Syā)

Vinayapiṭaka/X/X/168.text: Vicarissasi viharissasi abhiramissasi cāti (Sī), carissasi viharissasi abhiramissasi vāti (Syā)

Pārājikakaṇḍaaṭṭhakathā/X/X/172.text: Vicarissasi viharissasi abhiramissasi cāti (Sī), carissasi viharissasi abhiramissasi vāti (Syā)
Aho vata yaṁ taṁ kucchigataṁ gabbhaṁ (sabbattha)

variants.reading: Aho vata yaṁ taṁ kucchigataṁ gabbhaṁ

Pārājikakaṇḍaaṭṭhakathā/X/X/195.text: Na idha evaṁ (Sī), idha na evaṁ (Syā)

Pārājikakaṇḍaaṭṭhakathā/X/X/231.text: Setodakoti (Syā, Ka), Aṁ 1. 166 piṭṭhe ca passitabbaṁ. 2. Ramaṇīyena (Ka)

Pārājikakaṇḍaaṭṭhakathā/X/X/232.text: Setodakoti (Syā, Ka), Aṁ 1. 166 piṭṭhe ca passitabbaṁ. 2. Ramaṇīyena (Ka)
Ogāhaṁ (Sī, Syā), ogāyha (Ka) 7. Ogāyha (Ka), idaṁ padaṁ Syā-potthake natthi.

Vinayapiṭaka/X/X/237.text: Na nāma passati (Sī, Syā), na supinaṁ nāma passati (Abhi-Ṭṭha 2. 390 piṭṭhe.)

Vinayapiṭaka/X/X/393.text: Evaṁ kātabbanti yaṁ (Sī), evaṁ iti yaṁ (Syā)

Vinayapiṭaka/X/X/424.text: Kaṇṭhakaṁ (Sī, Syā), Kaṇṭakaṁ (Ka) (Jātaka-Ṭṭha 1. 63; Khu 2 Vimānavatthusmiṁ 110 piṭṭhesu passitabbaṁ.)

Vinayapiṭaka/Kosiyavagga1Kosiyasikkhāpad.text: Paṭiviṁsoti (Sī, I) Paṭi + vi + aṁsa = paṭiviṁsa.

Vinayapiṭaka/Pattavagga1Pattasikkhāpadav.text: Bhadrāni (Sī, Ka) Pāḷiyaṁ hi “saṁghassa sacīvarabhattaṁ paṭiyattan”ti ca, “bhojetvācīvarena acchādessāmā”ti ca āgataṁ. Tena ñāyati “cīvarena saha dātabbaṁbhattaṁ cīvaralābhassa mukhaṁ kāraṇan”ti. Tenevetta bhattāti padaṁ bhattānīti vaṇṇetvā “lābhamukhānī”ti puna vaṇṇitaṁ.
